## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or contributor-visible result.

## Why

Link the issue or Discussion and explain the problem being solved.

## Verification

List the checks you ran and the devices/emulators you used.

## Screenshots or recording

Include before/after evidence for UI changes. Redact hosts, Tailnet addresses, credentials, and terminal contents.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated generated files or dependency updates.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant validation commands from `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible behavior.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, private keys, or sensitive terminal output.
- [ ] I documented copied, generated, adapted, or ported material and preserved required notices.
